title: Polish-Style Apricot Flatbread
description: A sweet and savory flatbread topped with a Polish-inspired apricot filling, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Cut each flatbread into 8 equal pieces.
In a small bowl, mix together chopped apricots, honey, and cinnamon.
Brush one side of each flatbread piece with water.
Place a spoonful of the apricot mixture on each flatbread piece.
Fold the flatbread in half to form a triangle.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the filling is caramelized.
